potential_missing.source_sentence: The system acts as a bridge between student and teacher to gain knowledge and monitor it by the institution (admin).

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall provide auto-evaluation of student performance during quizzes.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The scope of online quiz systems increased in this pandemic situation.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall be able to adapt to changing circumstances such as pandemics.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The objective of the system is to maintain and improve the education rate by conducting quizzes (exams).
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall prioritize maintaining and improving education rates through regular assessments.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: This system provides teachers to know about the students in remote education.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall facilitate teacher-student interaction in remote learning environments.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Admin is responsible for the registration of both teachers and students.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall enable administrators to manage user registrations.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow students to view the correct answers after completing a quiz.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not mentioned in the source text, but rather inferred from the description of student performance.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable administrators to register both teachers and students.
hallucinations.reason: While the source text mentions that admin is responsible for registration, it does not explicitly state that this should be a system feature.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall allow teachers to define the number of questions for a quiz.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall enable teachers to set the time of the quiz.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are similar and could be combined into a single requirement.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall provide auto-evaluation of student performance during quizzes.
ambiguities.reason: The source text mentions 'auto evaluation' but does not specify that it should occur during quizzes. This could be interpreted as a separate feature.
